prestazioni: Engine swap to a Nissan TD27Ti (TD27T turbocharged diesel, 2.7L inline-4) with a Garrett GT2259 turbo upgrade, custom intercooler piping, and a 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system featuring a custom 4-2-1 manifold by HKS for optimized turbo spool and reduced backpressure

Full suspension overhaul using Ohlins TTX40 coilovers with 22mm adjustable front sway bar (Nismo) and polyurethane bushings (SuperPro) for improved off-road articulation and on-road handling, paired with Bilstein B8 4600 remote-reservoir shocks for extreme durability

Custom ECU remap by Dastek (South Africa) for the TD27Ti, targeting 180hp and 320Nm torque with a fuel pressure increase via a Bosch CP3 high-pressure pump and 300cc injectors (Delphi), alongside a custom water-methanol injection kit (AEM) for EGT control
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody kit (RB-TER2) with custom fender flares, carbon fiber hood (Seibon), and rear diffuser (Rally Art) for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics, finished in Nissan Racing Yellow (KY0)

Custom front bumper with integrated LED light bar (Baja Designs Squadron Pro) and a winch mount for a Warn Zeon 10-S Platinum, paired with a custom rear bumper featuring a swing-out tire carrier and dual exhaust exits (Stainless Works)

Interior overhaul with Recaro SRD seats (cloth/Alcantara), custom roll cage (Custom Cages UK) with integrated harness bar, and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, alongside a full digital dash (AEM CD-7) and custom center console with integrated 4WD controls
